objects.name: CoAck_Projection_Model
objects.definition: A projection discipline where each CoAck updates a full canonical state and emits context-gated projections.

objects.name: CoSurf_Working_Layer
objects.definition: A structured staging layer where ideation is transformed into CI-usable forms prior to stabilization.

objects.name: CoTx_Deconflict
objects.definition: A coordination transition that evaluates overlap risk and prevents duplicate or conflicting CoEx.
